meta.description: Configuration for intent / slot detection over ROI intrusion events.
meta.author: system

person.description: Any human figure in the scene, including potential intruders, workers, and visitors.

car.description: Motor vehicles including cars, vans, buses, and similar road vehicles.

bicycle.description: Human-powered two-wheeled vehicles such as bicycles.

motorbike.description: Motorized two-wheeled vehicles such as motorcycles and scooters.

dog.description: Canine animals such as dogs and puppies.

cat.description: Feline animals such as cats and kittens.

night.description: Late evening to early morning, crossing midnight.

intruder_query.description: Questions that care specifically about intrusions or unauthorized access.
examples: Was there an intruder detected at 2 to 3?

movement_query.description: Generic movement / presence queries that are not explicitly about intruders.
examples: Was there any movement in night?
Was there any car activity this afternoon?

summary_query.description: High-level requests for a summary of activity over a period.
examples: Give me a summary of intrusions last night.

count_intrusions.description: Requests that explicitly ask for counts of intruder events.
examples: How many intruders were detected last night?
How many intrusions happened between 2 and 3?

first_detection.description: Questions that want to know when activity first started.
examples: At what time was the first intruder detected?

help_query.description: User asks what the system can do or for help.

time_range.description: Start and end time constraints derived from query text, expressed as hours or named periods.

object_class.description: Canonical object class label (e.g. person, car) derived from synonyms in the query or detection labels.

camera_id.description: Camera identifier for multi-camera setups, if mentioned explicitly in the query.

default.description: Default camera configuration for ROI intrusion monitoring.

messages.unknown_object_type: I didn't understand which object type you're asking about. I currently see these object labels in the detections: {known_classes}. Try asking something like "Was there a person detected between 2 and 3?" or "Was there any car detected at night?".
messages.no_object_labels: I can answer questions about intruders or movement over time, and about specific object types that appear in the detections, but this log doesn't contain any object labels.
messages.no_intruder: No intruder events were detected for the requested time period.
messages.no_intruder_with_object: No intruder events involving a {object_class} were detected for the requested time period.
messages.no_movement: No movement events were detected for the requested time period.
messages.no_movement_with_object: No movement events with a {object_class} present were detected for the requested time period.
messages.no_relevant_events: No relevant events were found for the requested time period.
messages.yes_intruder: Yes, intruder activity was detected between {time_interval}.
messages.yes_intruder_with_object: Yes, intruder activity involving a {object_class} was detected between {time_interval}.
messages.unclear_event_type: Activity was recorded between {time_interval}, but the type of event requested was unclear.
messages.first_detection_at: First detection between {time_interval}. Activity continued throughout that period.
messages.first_detection_none: No detections in the requested time period, so there's no first detection time.
messages.count_zero: No intrusions in the requested time period.
messages.summary_none: No activity in the requested time period.
messages.query_empty: Please type a question about intrusions, movement, or detections (e.g. time range or object type).
messages.query_too_long: Query is too long. Please shorten and try again.
messages.help_response: I can tell you about intrusions and movement in your footage. I currently see these object types: {known_classes}. Try asking: "Was there an intruder at 2 to 3?" or "Was there any movement at night?" or "Was there a car between 10 and 11?"
messages.help_response_no_classes: I can answer questions about intruders or movement over time. This log doesn't have object labels yet. Try asking: "Was there an intruder at 2 to 3?" or "Was there any movement at night?"

ui.ask_question_intro: Ask a question about intrusions or movement (people, cars, etc.), e.g.:
example_queries: Was there an intruder detected at 2 to 3?
Was there any movement in night?
Was there any car detected between 10 and 11?
